creator: olaf@zaplinski.de
text:
/usr/local/share/examples/munin-contrib/plugins/ssl/ssl_ is not working as expected:

root@betsy:/usr/local/etc/munin/plugins # ln -s /usr/local/share/examples/munin-contrib/plugins/ssl/ssl_  ssl_betsy.tuxfriends.net

root@betsy:/usr/local/etc/munin/plugins # munin-run ssl_betsy.tuxfriends.net
Can't exec "/usr/local/etc/munin/plugins/ssl_betsy.tuxfriends.net": No such file or directory at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Munin/Node/Service.pm line 263.
# FATAL: Failed to exec.
